messages.content: Build a product search typeahead in RxJS v7 with typed input and result streams.
Build a GitHub repo autocomplete stream in RxJS v7 using typed events and context.
Build a customer-lookup typeahead observable pipeline in RxJS v7.
Build a city-name autocomplete using RxJS v7 with an explicit Observable<string> input.
Build a typed email-address suggester in RxJS v7.
Build a stock-ticker symbol search stream in RxJS v7.

Fix this RxJS fragment to use v7 idioms — operators should be pipeable, `.do` renamed, no `any`:

```ts
input$
  .debounceTime(300)
  .distinctUntilChanged()
  .do((q: any) => log(q))
  .switchMap((q: any) => fetchTags(q))
```

Fix this half-written autocomplete to use v7 idioms (pipeable ops, explicit types, no `any`):

```ts
searchBox$
  .pipe(debounceTime(200))
  .pipe(distinctUntilChanged())
  .pipe(switchMap((q: any) => api(q)));
```
What's the RxJS v7 way to debounce a search input, dedupe identical queries, and cancel stale requests? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to implement a live-filter on a list as the user types? Show a minimal example with explicit types.
What's the v7 way to throttle a type-to-save form (persist draft as the user types)? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to build a type-to-filter stream over a paginated API? Show a minimal example.
What's the v7 way to wire a type-ahead pipeline when the input is already an Observable<string>? Show a minimal example.
Show me the v7 equivalent of chained `.debounceTime().distinctUntilChanged().switchMap()` on an Observable prototype. Brief example.
Show me the v7 equivalent of the pre-v7 `.do()` operator used in a search pipeline. Brief example.
Show me the v7 equivalent of `flatMap` / `flatMapLatest` in a typeahead context. Brief example.
Implement a movie-search typeahead in RxJS v7 with strict types — no `any`, every observable and callback parameter typed.
Implement a type-to-tag recipe search in RxJS v7 with strict types — Observable<T> explicit everywhere.
Implement a dictionary lookup stream in RxJS v7 with strict types — discriminated union for results.
Implement a tagged type-to-search for support tickets with strict types and an explicit Observable<string> input.
Explain briefly how a RxJS v7 typeahead pipeline works, then show a working typed implementation.
Explain briefly how debounce + distinct + switchMap composes for a live-filter stream, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how switchMap cancels stale in-flight requests in a search pipeline, then show a typed implementation.
Explain briefly how a type-to-search pipeline handles empty strings, then show a typed implementation that skips them.

Write an RxJS v7 stream that implements a podcast-search typeahead. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, operators imported from `'rxjs/operators'`, `debounceTime(300)`, `distinctUntilChanged()`, and cancel stale requests.
Write an RxJS v7 stream for type-ahead hashtag suggestions. Constraints: min-length filter of 1 char after stripping the leading `#`, 200ms debounce, dedupe on normalized value.
Write an RxJS v7 stream that live-filters a to-do list as the user types. Constraints: synchronous filter using `of(...)`, debounce 150ms, strict types, no `any`.
Write an RxJS v7 stream for a type-to-save note editor. Constraints: debounce 500ms, cancel the previous save if a newer keystroke arrives, strict types.
Write an RxJS v7 stream for typeahead over a sports-team directory. Constraints: 300ms debounce, skip queries under 2 chars, case-insensitive dedupe, typed result, no `any`.
